blended.narrative: Boyne Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 136 ft. Looking ahead, 34 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 2.2" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 13°F. Expect powder.
